member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.AsposeHelper.GetCellValueAsString(Aspose.Cells.Cell)
member.summary: Lay gia tri cua cell duoi dang string, tuy theo kieu du lieu trong cell.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.AsposeHelper.FindTableStartPosition(Aspose.Cells.Worksheet,System.String)
member.summary: Tim vi tri bat dau cua tat ca cac Table hoac mot Table theo ten.
member.param: Ten table (tuy chon). Neu khong truyen se tra toan bo danh sach.
member.returns: Neu co ten table -> tra ve vi tri (row, column) dau tien cua table do. Neu khong co ten table -> tra ve danh sach tat ca cac vi tri.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.AsposeHelper.GetAbsoluteCellName(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Chuyen doi chi so (row, col) (0-indexed) sang dinh dang o tuyet doi, vi du: $A$1.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.ExporterHelper.ExportDynamic(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.DynamicExportInstruction)
member.summary: Export dynamic using dictionary data - reads column mappings from Excel template. No property reflection required, maps dictionary keys to template columns directly.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.ExporterHelper.ExportHierarchical``3(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.TwoLevelHierarchicalInstruction{``0,``1,``2})
member.summary: Export hierarchical data voi 2 cap group Template structure: Row with $Header_1 -> Group header (full width merge) Row with $Header_2 and $Count -> Sub-group header (partial merge + count) Row with $STT, $NoiDung, etc. -> Data row template

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.ExporterHelper.ExportWithOutline``1(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.TreeOutlineInstruction{``0})
member.summary: Export tree data with Excel outline grouping (expand/collapse) Uses Level property for hierarchical grouping

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.ExporterHelper.ExportMultiLevelHierarchical(BuildingBlocks.CrossCutting.Offices.MultiLevelHierarchicalInstruction)
member.summary: Export multi-level hierarchical data with vertical cell merging. Supports N levels where Level 1 rows define merge boundaries.

member.name: M:BuildingBlocks.Infrastructure.Offices.WorksheetExtensions.ClearPlaceholderMarkers(Aspose.Cells.Worksheet)
member.summary: Clears all remaining $placeholder markers from the worksheet. Called after export to remove any unprocessed template markers.
